title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer reports that the login page keeps rejecting valid credentials even after resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment not reflected in account
description: Customer made a payment using a debit card but the invoice still shows as unpaid on the dashboard.

title: Error while uploading documents
description: User receives a server error message when trying to upload verification documents in the profile section.

title: Profile picture update failed
description: Customer attempts to upload a new profile photo but the system keeps showing an upload failed notification.

title: Dashboard loads very slowly
description: Customer reports that the dashboard takes more than fifteen seconds to load after logging in.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Customer says that ticket updates and activity notifications are not arriving in the registered email inbox.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Customer clicked the password reset link immediately but the page shows that the reset token has expired.

title: Cannot update billing address
description: User tries to change the billing address in account settings but the changes are not saved after submission.

title: Mobile layout appears broken
description: Customer using a mobile device reports that the navigation menu overlaps with the page content.

title: Two factor code not accepted
description: Customer enters the correct code from the authenticator app but the system rejects it as invalid.

title: Search results not accurate
description: Customer reports that the search feature returns unrelated results when searching for specific tickets.

title: Attachment download not working
description: User clicks the attachment download link but nothing happens and the file does not start downloading.

title: Session logs out too quickly
description: Customer complains that the account session expires after only a few minutes of inactivity.

title: Error message on settings page
description: User encounters a generic error message while trying to access the account settings page.

title: Unable to change password
description: Customer enters the correct current password but the system refuses to accept the new password.

title: Language settings not saved
description: User selects a different language in preferences but the interface reverts back after refreshing.

title: Notification badge count wrong
description: Customer says the notification badge shows unread messages even after opening all notifications.

title: API request failing intermittently
description: Developer reports that API calls occasionally fail with a timeout error during peak hours.

title: Form validation not triggering
description: Customer submits a form with missing fields but the validation does not display any warnings.

title: Ticket comments not updating
description: Customer adds a comment to a support ticket but the new message does not appear until the page reloads.
